Spring Warm.main_characteristic: High Value, High Chroma, Yellow Base (Warm)

light_spring.name: Light Spring
light_spring.styling_strategy: Focus on **Monochromatic** (tone-on-tone) looks using light neutrals. Avoid stark contrasts.
light_spring.fabric_pattern_tips: Soft textures, delicate botanicals, small or medium-scale patterns. **Shiny gold** hardware/accessories.

bright_spring.name: Bright Spring
bright_spring.styling_strategy: Use **color blocking** with clear, vibrant colors. Keep the contrast high.
bright_spring.fabric_pattern_tips: Crisp fabrics (cotton, silk, synthetics), geometric patterns, or abstract prints. **Polished, bright hardware.**

warm_spring.name: Warm Spring
warm_spring.styling_strategy: Build outfits around **Warm Neutrals** like Camel, then add one key Warm Pop Color.
warm_spring.fabric_pattern_tips: Natural, unpolished textures. Flowing fabrics. Prints should be nature-inspired and warm-toned.

Summer Cool.main_characteristic: Medium to High Value, Low Chroma, Blue Base (Cool)

light_summer.name: Light Summer
light_summer.styling_strategy: Utilize **Soft Contrast** (light color against slightly darker light color). Avoid stark contrasts.
light_summer.fabric_pattern_tips: Lightweight, airy fabrics (chiffon, linen blends, fine knits). Soft, watercolor-like prints. **Matte silver** hardware.

soft_summer.name: Soft Summer
soft_summer.styling_strategy: Rely on **Muted Neutrals** for the main garment, using muted colors near the face.
soft_summer.fabric_pattern_tips: Subdued textures, brushed cottons, subtle tweed. Blended, gentle prints (e.g., blurry abstract).

cool_summer.name: Cool Summer
cool_summer.styling_strategy: Use **True Cool Neutrals** (Medium Gray, Charcoal) and add medium-depth cool colors.
cool_summer.fabric_pattern_tips: Smooth, quality fabrics. Elegant, medium-scale prints that are distinctly cool-toned.

Autumn Warm.main_characteristic: Low Value, Low Chroma, Yellow Base (Warm)

soft_autumn.name: Soft Autumn
soft_autumn.styling_strategy: Embrace **Analogous Colors** (adjacent on the color wheel) to create a subtle, blended look. Avoid strong contrast.
soft_autumn.fabric_pattern_tips: Natural, unrefined textures (wool, suede, linen). Earthy, organic prints. **Aged gold or copper** hardware.

deep_autumn.name: Deep Autumn
deep_autumn.styling_strategy: Focus on **Deep Color Blocks**, using black as a grounding neutral.
deep_autumn.fabric_pattern_tips: Heavier, substantial fabrics (velvet, rich knits, leather). Large, bold, or complex patterns.

warm_autumn.name: Warm Autumn
warm_autumn.styling_strategy: The entire outfit should have a **Warm Glow**. Mix and match rich, spiced tones.
warm_autumn.fabric_pattern_tips: Textured and matte fabrics. Patterns should be bold, featuring only warm colors.

Winter Cool.main_characteristic: High Contrast (Very High/Very Low Value), High Chroma, Blue Base (Cool)

deep_winter.name: Deep Winter
deep_winter.styling_strategy: Use **High Contrast** (e.g., Black main garment with a White or True Red accent near the face).
deep_winter.fabric_pattern_tips: Structured, firm fabrics. Defined stripes or strong geometric patterns. **High-shine silver** or platinum hardware.

bright_winter.name: Bright Winter
bright_winter.styling_strategy: **Vivid Color Pops** are key. Use Black/White as the base, and add one Electric Color.
bright_winter.fabric_pattern_tips: Crisp, polished fabrics (patent leather, smooth silk/synthetic). High-energy, sharp, or abstract prints.

cool_winter.name: Cool Winter
cool_winter.styling_strategy: Keep the outfit **Cool-Toned** throughout, using deep jewel tones with cool neutrals (Icy Gray, White).
cool_winter.fabric_pattern_tips: Clean, modern fabrics. Patterns should be crisp and feature high contrast in cool shades.

straight.main_characteristic: Thick, well-developed musculature. Smooth skin texture. Upper body tends to look bulky. Bone structure is not prominent.
straight.styling_principle: Simple, Structured, Clean. Use clean H-line silhouettes to minimize upper body bulk.
straight.silhouette_intent: Create subtle waist definition (without constriction) and vertical openness. Avoid adding bulk to the torso.

preferred_elements.fabric_and_texture: Firm and substantial fabrics (Wool, thick Cotton, Leather, smooth Silk). Materials that hold their shape.
preferred_elements.fit_and_silhouette: Structured, tailored fit. V-Neck or U-Neck to open the chest area. Straight-leg bottoms, neat single-breasted jackets.
preferred_elements.details_and_accessories: Minimalist, high-quality, and clean designs. Avoid excessive decoration on the chest.

avoid_elements.fabric_and_texture: Thick chunky knits, thin/flimsy materials that cling, overly rough textures.
avoid_elements.fit_and_silhouette: Overly oversized fit (looks sloppy), high-waisted styles that cut the torso short.
avoid_elements.details_and_accessories: Ruffles, heavy layering on the chest, or large volume details on the upper body.

wave.main_characteristic: Delicate and thin bone structure. Weight tends to accumulate on the lower body. Upper body looks slender and soft.
wave.styling_principle: Soft, Curved, Decorative. Emphasize the X-line (waist definition) and add volume/interest to the upper body.
wave.silhouette_intent: Highlight natural waist curvature and add upper-body volume while keeping the lower body visually balanced.

preferred_elements.fabric_and_texture: Soft, thin, and lightweight fabrics (Chiffon, Mohair, Angora, Soft Tweed, Soft Cotton).
preferred_elements.fit_and_silhouette: High Waist to define the torso. Rounded necklines (Round, Boat Neck). A-line, Tapered, or Flared silhouettes.
preferred_elements.details_and_accessories: Intricate, delicate details like gathers, tucks, and light decorations. Small, refined hardware.

avoid_elements.fabric_and_texture: Stiff or heavy materials (Rigid Leather, Heavy Canvas), chunky knits, rough denim.
avoid_elements.fit_and_silhouette: Low-waist styles, long coats/jackets that completely hide the body line, overly sharp/boxy lines.
avoid_elements.details_and_accessories: Oversized, heavy accessories that overwhelm the delicate frame.

natural.main_characteristic: Prominent bone structure and joints (e.g., collarbones, hips). Large overall frame. Less emphasis on muscle or fat softness.
natural.styling_principle: Casual, Loose Fit, Lengthy. Use long, relaxed lines to work with the skeletal frame.
natural.silhouette_intent: Honor the natural skeletal frame through relaxed, elongated lines and intentional looseness without sharp tailoring.

preferred_elements.fabric_and_texture: Rough, casual, and sturdy materials (Linen, heavy Cotton, Tweed, Corduroy, Distressed Leather). Layered textures.
preferred_elements.fit_and_silhouette: Loose fit or Oversized silhouettes. Longline coats or full-length garments. Layered styling.
preferred_elements.details_and_accessories: Large, bold, or handcrafted accessories. Asymmetrical designs. Long scarves and wide belts.

avoid_elements.fabric_and_texture: Overly soft, flimsy, or overly shiny fabrics (Satin, thin Silk).
avoid_elements.fit_and_silhouette: Body-hugging tight fits, short or overly tailored designs that emphasize the joints.
avoid_elements.details_and_accessories: Delicate small details or fussy, intricate decorations.

Minimalist.vibe: Less is more. Clean lines, neutral palette, focus on silhouette.
Minimalist.fabric_focus: Crisp cotton, structured wool, matte silk.

Streetwear.vibe: Rooted in youth culture. Comfortable, oversized, logo-centric or graphic.
Streetwear.fabric_focus: Heavyweight jersey, fleece, technical nylon, denim.

Old Money.vibe: Stealth wealth. Heritage styles that imply generational status.

Y2K.vibe: Late 90s/Early 2000s nostalgia. Playful, slightly tacky, skin-baring.

Coquette.vibe: Hyper-feminine, vintage innocence, delicate and playful.

Corporate Chic.vibe: The 'Office Siren'. Sharp, authoritative, but fitted and stylish.
Corporate Chic.fabric_focus: Pinstripe wool, crisp shirting, patent leather.

Athleisure.vibe: Performance wear styled for everyday life. Sleek and functional.

Grunge.vibe: 90s Seattle rock scene. Anti-fashion, distressed, layered.
Grunge.fabric_focus: Flannel, distressed denim, waffle knit, leather.

Preppy.vibe: Ivy League classic. Collegiate, neat, and polished.
Preppy.fabric_focus: Cable knit, oxford cloth, wool gabardine.

Avant-Garde.vibe: Fashion as art. Deconstructed, asymmetrical, pushing boundaries.

Scandi.vibe: Copenhagen style. Practical comfort mixed with playful colors and prints.
Scandi.fabric_focus: Recycled poly, organic cotton, mohair knits.
